{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150809E7427DB4F5308DF72D2F"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486028807683490585","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到十二章还是一脸懵，可能太奥秘了！不过太好看了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742981329,"group_id":"7466687611885587518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9tDg7w89C3PWwdN6Nbi+HirhlDBmWf8VqK1rlgQOqdz","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3215411674643037","user_name":"喜欢风尾草的德莱格"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3215411674643037","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1672904907,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466687611885587518","book_info":{"abstract":"“区区练气，也敢诬我？找死！！！”

他本是神霄宗道子，身怀先天道胎与重瞳异象，千年难遇的一品金丹天骄。

但自家青霄峰的大师姐，两位小师妹，乃至于手下的妖仆......都因一练气小贼之言，对他心怀妒恨，甚至于暗中勾结外人，欲置他于死地。

他以为这只是同门相争，却不知——

那些忽然冒出来的“天才”，那些修为暴涨的“奇遇者”，那些对他恨之入骨的“仇人”，背后都站着同一个影子。

“系统”？

不过是他丹田之中那枚“造化玉碟”外泄的一缕道韵罢了。

当一个个穿越者带着金手指降临，当系统的光芒在他面前疯狂闪烁——

姬辰星只是轻笑一声，抬手便是一道九霄神雷。

“你的系统，我收下了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3fe96385ffb6f8cc63b10c4c2a108142~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘陆珋","author_id":"","book_id":"7466687611885587518","book_name":"我神霄道子，你一炼气安敢诬我？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1297人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7466714251525095998","read_count":"1297","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"219881"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"91","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,架空,东方玄幻,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3fe96385ffb6f8cc63b10c4c2a108142~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174489&x-signature=cKYAg0fOrQGnV7%2BXlRxt%2BgWN0%2F8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1913620784227143","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150809E7427DB4F5308DF72D2F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forw
